name: routes-payroll
description: Professional payroll system with: - Secure local admin login - Year-month payroll management - All requested payroll fields and formulas - Payslip preview, print/save PDF flow, TXT download - WhatsApp and Messenger share actions - CSV export and JSON backup/restore - PWA support (installable, offline cache)

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check app.js && node --check sw.js
